evaluators.name: Quote Request for 2BR Local Move with Lowest Sub-$150 Slot
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a 2-bedroom local quote for June 15 and selected the lowest-priced qualifying time slot at or under $150/hour with contact details filled.

evaluators.name: Full-Service 3-Mover Local 2BR Booking with Packing and No Storage
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a local full-service 3-mover move for a 2-bedroom home around the third week of June with a sub-$900 4-hour estimate including packing but no storage, and completed the booking.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Qualifying Local Package Added to Comparison
evaluators.description: Checks that the user filtered local move packages with the required constraints, sorted by highest rating, and added the top qualifying result to the comparison list.

evaluators.name: Studio Local Move with Earliest 9–12 Arrival in Early June
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a local studio apartment move for an early-June date with the earliest available 9:00–12:00 arrival window and completed the booking details.

evaluators.name: Estimator Adjusts Box Count for 1BR Move Under $500 and Starts Booking
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a 1-bedroom estimate with higher box count, recalculated with fewer boxes to bring total under $500, and started a booking from the adjusted estimate.

evaluators.name: 2-Hour Labor-Only Job with 2 Movers Under $120/hr
evaluators.description: Checks that the user reserved a 2-hour local labor-only job with 2 movers, no truck, hourly rate at or under $120, using the loading/unloading-only service option and completed the reservation.

evaluators.name: Local 1BR Move with $50 Promo Applied Under $600 Total
evaluators.description: Checks that the user applied the $50 local-move promotion to a 1-bedroom local move with pre-discount total $600–$650 so the final total is under $600, and completed the booking.

evaluators.name: 3BR House Move with $15k Full-Value Protection Under $1,800
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started a local 3-bedroom house move with a full-value $15,000 protection plan selected, on an early-July date, keeping the estimated total under $1,800 and completing the booking.
